news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Motive Medical Intelligence (Motive), a prominent healthcare data and analytics firm focused on improving physician performance and value-based care, announced the appointment of Jay Sultan as the Executive Vice President of Product Strategy and Management. This move is significant as Sultan will now play a key role in shaping the company’s direction in this strategic capacity. This decision reflects Motive’s commitment to enhancing its product offerings and ensuring a strong leadership team.
news.headline: Motive Medical Intelligence names Jay Sultan EVP of Product Strategy and Management. Leading healthcare data company.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, IQSTEL Inc., a prominent multinational telecommunications and technology company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol IQST, revealed that it has secured a definitive agreement to purchase a majority stake of 51% in GlobeTopper, an innovative fintech company operating through GlobeTopper.com. This acquisition marks a significant move for IQSTEL Inc. as it continues its rapid expansion in the telecommunications and emerging technology sectors.
news.headline: IQSTEL Inc. acquires 51% of fintech company GlobeTopper, fast-tracking $1 billion growth plan. Expanding global presence.

news.summary: Joining Crowell & Moring in California, Stacey Geis, a former deputy assistant administrator at the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, bolsters the firm's Environmental and White Collar Practices. The addition of Geis on May 29, 2025, enhances the expertise in the Environment, Energy, and Natural Resources sector.
news.headline: Stacey Geis, former EPA official, joins Crowell & Moring in California to strengthen environmental and white collar practices.

news.summary: In Montevideo on May 29, 2025, Mercado Libre (NASDAQ: MELI), the top e-commerce and fintech platform in Latin America, debuts a new segment on the Inside Mercado Libre podcast called CFO Perspectives. Martin de los Santos, Mercado Libre's CFO, collaborates with Richard Cathcart, the Investor Relations Officer, to discuss the company's performance post the latest earnings report. This insightful discussion offers reflections and a sneak peek into Mercado Libre's future direction.
news.headline: Mercado Libre's CFO discusses Q1'2025 highlights on new podcast episode with host Richard Cathcart.

news.summary: A newly constructed model home in a prestigious community is currently on the market for sale. This stunning property features modern design elements and luxurious finishes throughout. With a spacious floor plan of 3,500 square feet, the home boasts four bedrooms, three bathrooms, and a two-car garage. The property offers breathtaking views and is located in a highly sought-after neighborhood. Don't miss this opportunity to own a showcase home in this exclusive community. Contact us for more details and to schedule a viewing.
news.headline: Toll Brothers is offering the final luxury home in Haven Oaks, Orlando, including a model home for sale.
Japan and China begin work to resume Japan seafood exports - Kyodo.

news.summary: NeuroOne Medical Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: NMTC), based in EDEN PRAIRIE, Minn., revealed its involvement in the upcoming MedInvest MedTech, AI, and Digital Health Conference in San Francisco, CA on June 3-4, 2025. The company, specializing in enhancing surgical care for patients with neurological disorders, shared this news on May 29, 2025.
news.headline: NeuroOne to attend MedInvest's MedTech, AI & Digital Health Conference on June 3-4, 2025 in San Francisco, announced on May 29, 2025.

news.summary: Workiva Inc. (NYSE:WK) made public its decision to add Astha Malik, who serves as the Chief Business Officer of Braze, Inc. (Nasdaq:BRZE), to its board of directors based in New York.
news.headline: Workiva appoints Astha Malik, Chief Business Officer of Braze, Inc., to its board of directors.NYSE:WK, Nasdaq:BRZE.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Omnissa, a prominent digital work platform firm, revealed its recognition as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Employee Experience (DEX) Management Tools. Acknowledged for its comprehensive vision and operational capability, Omnissa was commended for its high rank among vendors across all five Use Cases in the 2025 Gartner® Critical Capabilities for DEX Management Tools. This achievement signifies Omnissa's dedication to excellence in the industry.
news.headline: Omnissa named Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Employee Experience Management, top 3 in Critical Capabilities for DEX tools.

news.summary: A new investment opportunity has been unveiled by Cantor Fitzgerald Asset Management (CFAM) in New York. The company is set to introduce the Cantor Fitzgerald Gold Protected Bitcoin Fund, L.P., which will offer investors a unique combination of direct exposure to Bitcoin along with protection against downside risks tied to the value of gold. This pioneering Fund marks CFAM's foray into Bitcoin-focused investments and is designed with a five-year lifespan. The Fund aims to provide unlimited potential gains from Bitcoin, while also ensuring a one-to-one safeguard against losses.
news.headline: Cantor Fitzgerald to launch Gold Protected Bitcoin Fund with 5-year duration, offering uncapped upside and 1-to-1 downside protection.

news.summary: Today in Redwood City, California, Snorkel AI introduced two new products on the Snorkel AI Data Development Platform. These products are Snorkel Evaluate and Snorkel Expert Data-as-a-Service, aimed at facilitating the transition from prototype to production at scale by using Snorkel AI’s innovative programmatic data development technology. Alongside these new offerings, Snorkel AI revealed that it has secured $100 million in Series D funding, marking a substantial milestone in their mission to transform knowledge into specialized AI solutions.
news.headline: Snorkel AI secures $100M in Series D funding, expands platform with new offerings for specialized AI development.

news.summary: The prestigious Antoinette Perry "Tony" Awards® are co-hosted by The Broadway League and the American Theatre Wing. On May 29, 2025, it was announced from New York and Pittsburgh that Gary Edwin Robinson, the leader of Boys and Girls High School's Theatre Arts Program in Brooklyn, NY, had achieved a significant accomplishment.
news.headline: Gary Edwin Robinson of Boys and Girls High School, Brooklyn, wins 2025 Excellence in Theatre Education Award. Presented by Tony Awards and Carnegie Mellon University.

news.summary: In Lansing, Michigan on May 29, 2025, AF Group made public the promotion of multiple executives, demonstrating the organization's robust leadership. Notable promotions include Patrick Stewart to the role of vice president of Business Performance and Strategy. This highlights the commitment to excellence and advancement within the company.
news.headline: AF Group in Lansing, Mich., announces executive promotions, like Patrick Stewart as VP of Business Performance and Strategy.

news.summary: A recent report has highlighted the main participants in the environmental and sustainability consulting market in the United States based on their consulting revenue. The analysis was conducted on May 29, 2025, in WINDSOR, Conn. One of the prominent companies in this sector is TRC Companies, Inc. (TRC), a renowned global professional services firm that offers comprehensive strategy and consulting services.
news.headline: TRC ranked 6th in U.S. E&S consulting market assessment based on consulting revenue per report by Environment Analyst.

news.summary: Salesforce Inc (NYSE: CRM) shares have dipped following the release of its first-quarter financial results. The company exceeded expectations with total revenue reaching $9.83 billion, surpassing the projected $9.75 billion. Adjusted earnings per share stood at $2.58, higher than the estimated $2.55 per share. Year-over-year, total revenue saw an 8% increase, and free cash flow rose by 4% to $6.3 billion. Looking ahead, Salesforce expects second-quarter revenue to range between $10.11 billion and $10.16 billion, compared to the anticipated $10.01 billion. The company's performance has received a mixed response from analysts, impacting its stock value.
news.headline: Salesforce beats Q1 estimates with revenue of $9.83 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.58 per share, but stock is down.

news.summary: Amazon platforms will now feature editorial content from The Times as a result of a lawsuit filed in 2023 against OpenAI and Microsoft for copyright infringement. The Times took legal action after alleging that their content was being used without permission. The lawsuit has led to a resolution where The Times' editorial pieces will now be available on Amazon platforms. This development showcases the importance of protecting intellectual property rights in the digital age.
news.headline: Amazon and The New York Times strike A.I. deal after suing OpenAI and Microsoft in 2023. Editorial content will be on Amazon.

news.summary: Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the Health Secretary, has expressed concerns multiple times about the safety of mRNA technology utilized in the company's vaccine.
news.headline: U.S. ends Moderna contract for Bird Flu vaccine amid safety concerns over mRNA technology by Health Secretary.

Two nuns in Brazil have gone viral on social media for their beatboxing and dancing skills. Nun Marizele Cassiano took viewers by surprise when she began beatboxing and Sister Marisa Paula de Neves adjusted her dance routine to match the changing beat.

news.summary: ROKFORM, a renowned brand in high-quality mobile accessories designed for superior performance and longevity, introduced the latest version of its popular G-ROK golf speaker on May 29, 2025. The new product, named the G-ROK PRO Bluetooth Golf Speaker, represents a significant advancement from its predecessor. Specifically tailored for golf enthusiasts, this speaker is equipped with advanced features to enhance the overall golfing experience.
news.headline: ROKFORM launches G-ROK PRO premium Bluetooth golf speaker for powerful sound with all-day battery life.

news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on May 29, 2025, a new 2026 Dodge Durango R/T Blacktop Redline package has been introduced, equipped with a powerful HEMI® engine. This vehicle includes new 20-by-8-inch Black Noise wheels, blacked-out HEMI and Dodge badging, as well as front and rear SRT spoilers. The 2026 Dodge Durango R/T features an updated wheel lineup, offering enhanced performance and style.
news.headline: Dodge reveals 2026 Durango lineup with HEMI®-powered R/T Blacktop Redline package, boasting 20-by-8-inch wheels.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Cleveland, a partnership was revealed between PLP, a prominent broadband connectivity solutions provider, and Lightera, a leading optical fiber technology innovator. The collaboration introduced a new compatibility program combining PLP's drop closures with Lightera's rollable ribbon fiber optic cable. This initiative aims to optimize broadband connectivity solutions by leveraging PLP's expertise and Lightera's cutting-edge technology. The program is set to enhance efficiency and performance in the industry, potentially benefiting a wide range of consumers.
news.headline: PLP and Lightera launch compatibility program for FTTX closures and rollable ribbon cable, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Borderless.xyz, a worldwide payments infrastructure firm facilitating transactions through stablecoins and real-world assets, announced the addition of Koywe, a Latin America-centered crypto to fiat infrastructure provider, to its expanding network.
news.headline: Borderless.xyz welcomed Koywe, a Latin America-centric crypto to fiat infrastructure provider, expanding stablecoin liquidity.

news.summary: In honor of national Older Adults Month, the Santa Clara Family Health Plan (SCFHP) in San Jose, California, held its third Older Adult Resource Fair on May 17, 2025. The event was free and open to adults aged 60 and above. This annual fair aims to provide valuable health resources and information to older adults, supporting their well-being.
news.headline: SCFHP's Older Adult Resource Fair on May 17 for those 60+ in San Jose celebrated National Older Adults Month. Free event.
WHITE HOUSE TO ISSUE NEW HIRING PLANS FOR FEDERAL WORKERS - AXIOS

news.summary: Washington Trust, the nation's oldest community bank originating in Rhode Island, has revealed its 225th-anniversary logo and launched a Community Checking Campaign alongside special events to commemorate the milestone. The Bank, founded in Rhode Island and distinguished as the oldest of its kind in the country, will mark this occasion with various festivities.
news.headline: Washington Trust, oldest US community bank, celebrates 225th birthday with logo, checking campaign, events.

news.summary: In Norris, Tennessee on May 29, 2025, the reopening of Bald River Road and its parking area within the Cherokee National Forest was announced by the U.S. Forest Service. These locations had been shut down since August 2023 to undergo substantial repairs and enhancements. This included the replacement of the Bald River Bridge and other infrastructure improvements. The reopening provides access to the popular recreational area and signifies the completion of a project that lasted approximately 2 years.
news.headline: Bald River Falls in East Tennessee reopens to visitors on May 30 after being closed for repairs since August 2023.

news.summary: Experienced industry professional Nicole Martone has been appointed to spearhead operational excellence and drive strategic growth initiatives for Towne & Country Management, an esteemed provider of boutique property management services in New Jersey. The announcement was made on May 29, 2025, in Edison, highlighting the company's commitment to enhancing its services under her leadership. This move is expected to boost the company's performance and capitalize on new opportunities in the market.
news.headline: Nicole Martone named Partner and COO at Towne & Country Management, leading growth initiatives. (Characters: 89)

news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in the past 20 years. This decrease in unemployment was accompanied by an increase in job creation, with over 300,000 new jobs being added to the economy. Additionally, the stock market has seen a significant rise, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute this positive economic growth to various factors, including increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing and construction sectors. Overall, these statistics indicate a strengthening economy with promising prospects for future growth and recovery.
news.headline: Michael Cembalest discusses why AI could be the stock market's best investment yet.

news.summary: A coaching powerhouse headquartered in Scottsdale is achieving unprecedented success in the industry, boasting an impressive annual revenue of $25 million. Despite the competitive and image-focused nature of the fitness sector, Supra Human is making a notable impact with its innovative approach. The company, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, is rapidly expanding and poised for continued growth and triumph.
news.headline: NFL veteran John Madsen & CEO Nineveh Madsen create Supra Human, a $25M fitness empire transforming lives globally.
Nomad Temporary Housing named Global Supplier of the Year by Sirva Worldwide Relocation, with over 1,900 supplier partners.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Vienna, Virginia, Ashley A. H. Gray, MPP was recognized in The Inner Circle and honored as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence due to her noteworthy work in Health Policy and Federal Health Programs. Gray, a respected authority in the field, has made significant contributions in this area.
news.headline: Ashley A. H. Gray acknowledged as a Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for Health Policy.

news.summary: In the upcoming 8th edition of National Prosecco Week, set to occur in less than a month, top U.S. retailers such as Costco, Total Wine & More, Albertsons, Twin Liquors, Spec's, and Binny's are joining in, making this edition the most expansive yet. Scheduled for May 29, 2025, the event is expected to reach a larger audience compared to previous years.
news.headline: Prosecco DOC partners with top US retailers like Costco, Total Wine & More for 8th National Prosecco Week in May 2025.
Statement on Chair Powell's meeting with the President

news.summary: In Chicago, ComEd recently revealed that the Illinois Commerce Commission (ICC) has given the green light to its second Beneficial Electrification (BE) Plan. This plan involves injecting about $168 million into the initiative over the span of three years, commencing in 2026. This significant funding allocation highlights ComEd's dedication to boosting electric vehicle (EV) adoption and cutting emissions in northern Illinois. The approved plan builds on ComEd's earlier investment of $231 million in beneficial electrification efforts.
news.headline: ComEd approved $168M for Beneficial Electrification Plan 2, continuing to advance transportation electrification in Illinois.

news.summary: ROYERSFORD, Pennsylvania - On May 29, 2025, Toll Brothers Inc. (NYSE:TOL), the top builder of luxury homes in the US, unveiled its upcoming community, Canterbury Meadows, in Royersford, PA. This venture promises modern two-story home designs and premium amenities. The community site, located at 183 Kline Road, is currently undergoing preparation with an expected sale opening in fall 2025.
news.headline: Luxury home builder Toll Brothers to launch new community in Royersford, PA. Includes modern designs at 183 Kline Road, opening in fall 2025.

news.summary: Today, in Salt Lake City, Utah, the Board of Directors of TruGolf Holdings, Inc. unveiled a stock repurchase initiative. This move involves the authorization to repurchase a maximum of $2 million worth of TruGolf's Class A common stock. TruGolf Holdings, Inc., recognized as a prominent golf technology firm, is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol TRUG.
news.headline: TruGolf authorizes stock repurchase program of up to $2 million for its Class A common stock.
